_note: Batch 1 of the AOD Linear restructure: create the build-phase label taxonomy. 25 new labels (type, area, risk, from, MoSCoW). Existing labels (area:product/brand/kiosk/billing/integrations/app/backend, type:decision/spec/tech-task/bug) are NOT recreated. create-label is idempotent (reuses same-name). Run: node /Users/xavierperez/tools/linear-migration/migrate.mjs tools/linear/manifests/batch-1-labels.json

operations.name: type:design
operations.description: Design work: UX flows and visual/screen mockups. Output is Figma plus a handoff spec.

operations.name: type:user-story
operations.description: Externally meaningful unit of user value. Has acceptance criteria and a MoSCoW label.

operations.name: type:spike
operations.description: Time-boxed investigation. Output is a doc or decision, not shippable code.

operations.name: type:migration
operations.description: Data or schema migration. Often risky, often gated.

operations.name: type:validation-followup
operations.description: Captured during dogfooding or validation; may become a spec amendment.

operations.name: area:design-system
operations.description: Design tokens, component library, app IA, core screen mockups.

operations.name: area:onboarding
operations.description: First-run experience and connect-service flow.

operations.name: area:layout
operations.description: Free-form dashboard editor: place, resize, arrange widget instances.

operations.name: area:auth
operations.description: User accounts and sign-in (distinct from the OAuth broker in area:backend).

operations.name: area:integrations:linear
operations.description: Linear service and its widgets.

operations.name: area:integrations:calendar
operations.description: Google Calendar service and its widgets.

operations.name: area:integrations:claude
operations.description: Claude / Anthropic usage service and its widgets.

operations.name: area:integrations:weather
operations.description: Weather service (platform-owned key) and its widgets.

operations.name: area:integrations:clock
operations.description: Clock / Date ambient widget (no connection needed).

operations.name: risk:low
operations.description: Low delivery risk (implicit default; set only when a view needs it).

operations.name: risk:medium
operations.description: Medium delivery risk.

operations.name: risk:high
operations.description: High delivery risk; needs extra scrutiny (per-provider OAuth, billing webhook, kiosk pinning, encryption).

operations.name: from:vision
operations.description: Originated in product-vision.md.

operations.name: from:dogfood
operations.description: Surfaced from Xavier's daily kiosk use (AOD's validation source).

operations.name: from:build
operations.description: Surfaced during engineering.

operations.name: from:store-review
operations.description: Surfaced during App Store / Play review.

operations.name: must
operations.description: MoSCoW: required for v1. On type:user-story only.

operations.name: should
operations.description: MoSCoW: important but not vital for v1. On type:user-story only.

operations.name: could
operations.description: MoSCoW: desirable, opportunistic. On type:user-story only.

operations.name: wont
operations.description: MoSCoW: explicitly deferred (e.g., to v1.1). On type:user-story only.
